scenes.summary: 현재의 주인공이 낡은 지하철역에서 2002년으로 이어지는 빛을 발견한다.
scenes.narration: 낡은 역사 안, 시간은 조용히 2002년을 향해 열립니다.
scenes.imagePrompt: A cinematic documentary-style scene inside an old Seoul subway station, a modern traveler standing near a glowing time portal, subtle nostalgic atmosphere, soft film grain, emotional lighting, realistic photography
scenes.videoPrompt: Slow push-in through an old Seoul subway station as a soft glowing portal appears near the platform, the traveler steps closer, documentary realism, gentle camera shake, warm nostalgic light

scenes.summary: 2002년 거리응원 현장, 붉은 옷을 입은 시민들이 함께 대한민국을 외친다.
scenes.narration: 그해 여름, 우리는 처음 보는 마음으로 하나가 되었습니다.
scenes.imagePrompt: 2002 South Korea street cheering scene during the World Cup, crowds wearing red shirts, Korean flags waving, emotional faces, urban Seoul street at night, documentary photography, realistic, nostalgic film look
scenes.videoPrompt: Wide documentary shot of a massive red-clad crowd cheering in Seoul streets, Korean flags waving, people smiling and crying, slow motion moments, handheld camera, emotional and realistic atmosphere

scenes.summary: 현재로 돌아온 주인공이 조용한 광장에서 2002년의 기억을 되새긴다.
scenes.narration: 시간은 지나도, 그날의 뜨거운 함성은 우리 안에 남아 있습니다.
scenes.imagePrompt: Present-day Seoul plaza at dawn, a traveler quietly holding a faded red cheering scarf, empty square after memories of 2002, emotional documentary style, soft sunrise, realistic cinematic photography
scenes.videoPrompt: Slow tracking shot around a quiet present-day Seoul plaza at dawn, the traveler holds a faded red scarf and looks up, faint echo of cheering implied, soft sunrise, documentary realism, emotional ending
